chapter_title.en: Obligation of obedience to the undeniable authority

text: ١٥٦. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): عَلَيْكُمْ بِطَاعَةِ مَنْ لَا تُعْذَرُونَ بِجَهَالَتِهِ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 156. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: On you lies (the obligation of) obedience to the person about whom you cannot plead the excuse of ignorance. [1]
